title: OMT Officine Meccaniche Torino S.p.A. ransomware incident

extortion.description: Founded more than 85 years ago, OMT has served engine builders with dependable, high precision fuel injection equipment since the early days of large diesel engine development. In the intervening years, OMT has established long term customer relationships as a reliable partner of engine builders serving the global markets for marine propulsion, power generation and rail traction.
